sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 48:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 48:1
items.html: When there is no differentiation of above and below among the four phases in the desire, they are regarded as four circles one within the other, like onionskins. (Inner Light, Part 1, Chap 1, item 100)
